description: Return one weekly payroll JSON object. Currency values must be rounded to 2 decimals. `per_musician` must be ordered by musician_id. `conflict_flags` must be sorted alphabetically.

field_types.service_counts: object mapping service type to integer count
field_types.conflict_flags: sorted list using enum values: REHEARSAL_EARLY_START, REHEARSAL_LATE_END, SERVICE_OVER_TIME_LIMIT, SOUND_CHECK_DURATION_MISMATCH

per_musician.name: string
per_musician.categories: object mapping nonzero category names to currency amounts
